pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 8 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB runtime dependency because it was removed from the JDK module system starting with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using JAXB APIs will fail at runtime with NoClassDefFoundError or at compile time if the API is not on the classpath, as JAXB is no longer part of the standard JDK in Java 21.
